'''larodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwanza|kwanza]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwanza|kwanza]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| larodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læredeth|læredeth]] || [[word:læredej|læredej]] || [[word:læredesh|læredesh]] || [[word:lærede|lærede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:larorodoth|larorodoth]] || [[word:larorodoj|larorodoj]] || [[word:larorodosh|larorodosh]] || [[word:larorodo|larorodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:larodoth|larodoth]] || [[word:larodoj|larodoj]] || [[word:larodosh|larodosh]] || [[word:larodo|larodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:larofdoth|larofdoth]] || [[word:larofdoj|larofdoj]] || [[word:larofdosh|larofdosh]] || [[word:larofdof|larofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larodotho|larodotho]] || [[word:larodojo|larodojo]] || [[word:larodosho|larodosho]] || [[word:larodoko|larodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larodoth|larodoth]] || [[word:larodoj|larodoj]] || [[word:larodosh|larodosh]] || [[word:larodo|larodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larodothol|larodothol]] || [[word:larodojol|larodojol]] || [[word:larodoshol|larodoshol]] || [[word:larodokol|larodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larodothotho|larodothotho]] || [[word:larodojojo|larodojojo]] || [[word:larodoshosho|larodoshosho]] || [[word:larodoko|larodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larodothon|larodothon]] || [[word:larodojon|larodojon]] || [[word:larodoshon|larodoshon]] || [[word:larodokon|larodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larodothoro|larodothoro]] || [[word:larodojoro|larodojoro]] || [[word:larodoshoro|larodoshoro]] || [[word:larodokoro|larodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
